name: api-gateway-reseller
description: API forwarding gateway with API key management, wallet billing, and usage analytics.

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace apps/api & npm run dev --workspace apps/web
scripts.build: npm run db:generate && npm run build --workspace packages/db && npm run build --workspace apps/api && npm run build --workspace apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run db:generate && npm run build --workspace packages/db && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/api && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/web
